v3 governs. Section 9 states this packet supersedes the standalone roster versions where they conflict, and where v1 or v2 lists a student in a group that v3 has changed, v3 is operational.

Section 9 lists: the school nurse's confidential file on S-018; CHPS-OF-12 full text; SCO-CH-3 full text; the Marwick University tournament participant agreement; and the bus driver licenses (originals with drivers, copies on file with Transportation Office). Accommodation requests AR-2026-027, AR-2026-029, AR-2026-031 are referenced; originals are filed with the school nurse.
